info.title: SSHF API
info.description: API for managing veterans documents with Google authentication

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

flight.description: Flight ID filter for the search

offset.description: Starting offset of the result set

key.description: Search key used for this result

flight.description: Count of people per tour excluding nofly entries

busMismatch.description: True if people in the pair have different bus assignments

missingPairedPerson.description: True if a paired person is not on this flight

nofly.description: Whether person is marked as no-fly

confirmed.description: Whether person is confirmed for the flight

get.summary: Export flight roster data as CSV
get.description:
Proxies the CouchDB `flight-csv` list export and returns a CSV file.
This export accepts a flight name and an optional role filter.
The response is served as a downloadable CSV attachment.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional role-based filter for the flight export.

400.description: Missing or invalid query parameters

503.description: Database session could not be established

get.summary: Export call center follow-up list as CSV
get.description:
Proxies the CouchDB `callcenterfollowup-csv` list export and returns
a CSV file for the selected flight.

400.description: Missing required query parameters

503.description: Database session could not be established

get.summary: Export tour lead data as CSV
get.description:
Proxies the CouchDB `tourlead-csv` list export and returns
a CSV file for the selected flight.

400.description: Missing required query parameters

503.description: Database session could not be established

get.description:
Retrieves the current assignment data for a specified flight including:
- Flight metadata (name, capacity, date)
- List of veteran-guardian pairs assigned to the flight
- Counts of veterans, guardians, confirmed, and remaining capacity

Veterans and guardians marked as nofly are excluded from counts.
Pairs are sorted by group (if present) then by application date.

400.description: Document is not a flight record

post.summary: Add veterans from waitlist to flight
post.description:
Adds a specified number of veterans from the waitlist to the flight.

The selection follows these rules:
- Veterans are taken in order of application date
- When a veteran in a group is selected, all group members are added
- Veterans with paired guardians have their guardian added automatically
- Flight history entries are recorded for each assignment

The veteranCount must be between 1 and 100.

veteranCount.description: Number of veterans to add from waitlist

400.description: Invalid request (bad veteranCount or not a flight record)

get.summary: Retrieve flight detail data with seat and bus assignments
get.description:
Retrieves detailed seat and bus assignment data for a specified flight including:
- Flight metadata (name, capacity, date)
- Statistics:
  - Bus counts (None, Alpha1-5, Bravo1-5)
  - Tour counts (Alpha, Bravo, None)
  - Flight counts (excludes nofly entries)
- List of veteran-guardian pairs with seat/bus assignments

Each pair includes mismatch flags:
- busMismatch: true if people in the pair have different bus assignments
- missingPairedPerson: true if a paired person is not on this flight

Guardians paired with multiple veterans are deduplicated within each pair.

400.description: Document is not a flight record

get.summary: Retrieve a list of all flights
get.description:
Retrieves all flights from the database using the CouchDB "Flights" view.
Returns an array of flight objects containing name, flight_date, capacity, and completed fields.

400.description: Invalid flight data

get.summary: Retrieve a flight record by ID

400.description: Document is not a flight record
Invalid flight data or document is not a flight record
Invalid guardian data

get.summary: Retrieve a guardian record by ID

400.description: Document is not a guardian record

200.description: Guardian record updated successfully. When veteran.pairings array is modified, the affected veteran records are automatically updated to reflect the pairing changes. History entries are added to both guardian and veteran records.

400.description: Invalid guardian data or document is not a guardian record

x-code-samples.label: Example: Adding a veteran pairing

400.description: Document is not a guardian record

patch.description:
Quickly updates only the seat assignment for a guardian without loading the full model.
Adds a history entry for the change.

400.description: Invalid request or document is not a guardian record

patch.description:
Quickly updates only the bus assignment for a guardian without loading the full model.
Adds a history entry for the change.
Bus must be one of: None, Alpha1, Alpha2, Alpha3, Alpha4, Alpha5, Bravo1, Bravo2, Bravo3, Bravo4, Bravo5

400.description: Invalid request, invalid bus value, or document is not a guardian record

get.description:
Retrieves paginated recent activity entries from the database.
Shows various categories of recent changes from most recent to oldest.
The type parameter determines which category of changes to retrieve.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Type of recent activity to retrieve:
- modified: Recently modified records
- added: Recently added records
- call: Recent call changes
- flight: Recent flight changes
- pairing: Recent pairing changes

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero-based offset for pagination (number of records to skip)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

example.name: Catherine Manaspas
example.change: changed flight from: None to: SSHF-Test01

400.description: Invalid or missing type parameter

get.description:
Searches for veterans and guardians based on provided criteria.
The search can be filtered by status or flight, but not both simultaneously.
If status is not 'All', flight filter will be ignored.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: lastname
parameters.description: Last name to search for (partial match)

parameters.name: flight
parameters.description: Flight ID filter for the search (ignored if status is not 'All')

400.description: Invalid veteran data

get.summary: Retrieve a veteran record by ID

400.description: Document is not a veteran record
Invalid veteran data or document is not a veteran record
Document is not a veteran record

get.description:
Searches for unpaired veterans based on provided criteria.
Currently only supports searching for unpaired veterans (paired=false).
The search uses the unpaired_veterans_by_last_name view which filters
veterans where guardian.id is empty.

parameters.name: paired
parameters.description: Whether to search for paired veterans (currently not implemented)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Flight status filter for the search

parameters.name: lastname
parameters.description: Last name to search for (partial match, case-insensitive)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

501.description: Not Implemented - paired=true is not yet supported

patch.description:
Quickly updates only the seat assignment for a veteran without loading the full model.
Adds a history entry for the change.

400.description: Invalid request or document is not a veteran record

patch.description:
Quickly updates only the bus assignment for a veteran without loading the full model.
Adds a history entry for the change.
Bus must be one of: None, Alpha1, Alpha2, Alpha3, Alpha4, Alpha5, Bravo1, Bravo2, Bravo3, Bravo4, Bravo5

400.description: Invalid request, invalid bus value, or document is not a veteran record

get.summary: Retrieve waitlist entries for veterans or guardians
get.description:
Retrieves paginated waitlist entries from the database.
The veteran waitlist shows veterans waiting to be assigned to a flight.
The guardian waitlist shows unpaired guardians waiting to be matched with a veteran.
Results are returned in waitlist order as defined by the database views.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero-based offset for pagination (number of records to skip)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

400.description: Invalid or missing type parameter
